TEXT.id: PaiwanCh2_016_THE CHILD WHO WENT UP TO HEAVEN
TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}
TEXT.source: kakeḍian a ɫevavaw itjua kalevelevan (Qatsiɫay village, p.185)

S.FORM: uzai ka sitsuayan a mareaɫak i kavavuan a karakudakuda.
S.PHON: uzai ka siʦuajan a marəaʎak i kavavuan a karakudakuda.
S.FORM: uzai ka sicuayan a marealjak i kavavuan a karakudakuda.
S.PHON: uzai ka siʦuajan a maRəaʎak i kavavuan a kaRakudakuda.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time there was a family working in the fields.

S.FORM: a aɫak a tjavulung a vavayan nasemvaɫ tua kaka tjaɫaɫak a uqaɫay.
S.PHON: a aʎak a cavuɭuŋ a vavajan nasəmvaʎ tua kaka caʎaʎak a uqaʎaj.
S.FORM: a aljak a tjavulung a vavayan nasemvalj tua kaka tjaljaljak a uqaljay.
S.PHON: a aʎak a ʦavuɣuŋ a vavajan nasəmvaʎ tua kaka ʦaʎaʎak a uqaʎaj.
S.TRANSL: The older child, a girl, was carrying her younger brother on her back;

S.FORM: qau karakudakuda a kina.
S.PHON: qau karakudakuda a kina.
S.FORM: qau karakudakuda a kina.
S.PHON: qau kaRakudakuda a kina.
S.TRANSL: and the mother was working.

S.FORM: manu qemaung a sinvaɫ a kaka.
S.PHON: manu qəmauŋ a sinvaʎ a kaka.
S.FORM: manu qemaung a sinvalj a kaka.
S.PHON: manu qəmauŋ a sinvaʎ a kaka.
S.TRANSL: The brother being carried started crying.

S.FORM: qau katsuin nua nasemvaɫ a kaka tjavulung a vavayan a sema tjua kina, sa kiɫavarani a kina tua patutu tazua kaka a tjaɫaɫak.
S.PHON: qau kaʦuin nua nasəmvaʎ a kaka cavuɭuŋ a vavajan a səma cua kina, sa kiʎavarani a kina tua patutu tazua kaka a caʎaʎak.
S.FORM: qau kacuin nua nasemvalj a kaka tjavulung a vavayan a sema tjua kina, sa kiljavarani a kina tua patutu tazua kaka a tjaljaljak.
S.PHON: qau kaʦuin nua nasəmvaʎ a kaka ʦavuɣuŋ a vavajan a səma ʦua kina, sa kiʎavaRani a kina tua patutu tazua kaka a ʦaʎaʎak.
S.TRANSL: So his older sister who was carrying him took him to their mother, and asked her mother to suckle the younger brother.

S.FORM: manu "malatjak tu karakuda," ayain nua kina.
S.PHON: manu "maɭacak tu karakuda," ajain nua kina.
S.FORM: manu "malatjak tu karakuda," ayain nua kina.
S.PHON: manu "maɣaʦak tu kaRakuda," ajain nua kina.
S.TRANSL: “I must get on with the work,” her mother said to her,

S.FORM: qau ini patutu-i.
S.PHON: qau ini patutu-i.
S.FORM: qau ini patutu-i.
S.PHON: qau ini patutu-i.
S.TRANSL: and she wouldn’t suckle him.

S.FORM: ɫakua "matsuɫa aravats; patutu-i anan," ayain a mumaɫ a kiɫavaran a kina.
S.PHON: ʎakua "maʦuʎa aravaʦ; patutu-i anan," ajain a mumaʎ a kiʎavaran a kina.
S.FORM: ljakua "maculja aravac; patutu-i anan," ayain a mumalj a kiljavaran a kina.
S.PHON: ʎakua "maʦuʎa aRavaʦ; patutu-i anan," ajain a mumaʎ a kiʎavaRan a kina.
S.TRANSL: But she said again to her mother: “He’s very hungry; stop and suckle him,” she said.

S.FORM: ɫakua ini patsunguɫ.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini paʦuŋuʎ.
S.FORM: ljakua ini pacungulj.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini paʦuŋuʎ.
S.TRANSL: But she wouldn’t agree (OR feed him).

S.FORM: "kemudanga ken?" aya azua keḍikeḍian a semvaɫ, tu sika mapiq anga timadju, maya sika qemauqaung azua keḍikeḍi a sinvaɫ tua tsuɫan.
S.PHON: "kəmudaŋa kən" aja azua kəɖikəɖian a səmvaʎ, tu sika mapiq aŋa timaɉu, maja sika qəmauqauŋ azua kəɖikəɖi a sinvaʎ tua ʦuʎan.
S.FORM: "kemudanga ken?" aya azua kedrikedrian a semvalj, tu sika mapiq anga timadju, maya sika qemauqaung azua kedrikedri a sinvalj tua culjan.
S.PHON: "kəmudaŋa kən" aja azua kəɖikəɖian a səmvaʎ, tu sika mapiq aŋa timaɉu, maja sika qəmauqauŋ azua kəɖikəɖi a sinvaʎ tua ʦuʎan.
S.TRANSL: “What am I to do?” said the child who was carrying him, as she was tired; not to mention that the child she was carrying was crying with hunger.

S.FORM: ini anga purukuz tu kemuda.
S.PHON: ini aŋa purukuz tu kəmuda.
S.FORM: ini anga purukuz tu kemuda.
S.PHON: ini aŋa puRukuz tu kəmuda.
S.TRANSL: She couldn’t decide what to do.

S.FORM: vaik anga ɫevavaw tua mui a qatsiɫay.
S.PHON: vaik aŋa ʎəvavaw tua mui a qaʦiʎaj.
S.FORM: vaik anga ljevavaw tua mui a qaciljay.
S.PHON: vaik aŋa ʎəvavaw tua mui a qaʦiʎaj.
S.TRANSL: She went and climbed on a quartz rock.

S.FORM: qau sa senay azua keḍikeḍi a tjavulung.
S.PHON: qau sa sənaj azua kəɖikəɖi a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: qau sa senay azua kedrikedri a tjavulung.
S.PHON: qau sa sənaj azua kəɖikəɖi a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: The older child sang,

S.FORM: qau manu lemadenga a tsemas tua senay nazua keḍikeḍi.
S.PHON: qau manu ɭəmadəŋa a ʦəmas tua sənaj nazua kəɖikəɖi.
S.FORM: qau manu lemadenga a cemas tua senay nazua kedrikedri.
S.PHON: qau manu ɣəmadəŋa a ʦəmas tua sənaj nazua kəɖikəɖi.
S.TRANSL: and (a) god heard the child’s song.

S.FORM: mangtjez a tsemas a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: maŋcəz a ʦəmas a kiqənəc.
S.FORM: mangtjez a cemas a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: maŋʦəz a ʦəmas a kiqənəʦ.
S.TRANSL: The god came to look,

S.FORM: mintu penaula a tsemas.
S.PHON: mintu pənauɭa a ʦəmas.
S.FORM: mintu penaula a cemas.
S.PHON: mintu pənauɣa a ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: and had pity on them.

S.FORM: sualapen a kaka tjaɫaɫak a sinvaɫ; sa katsu-i a sema kalevelevan azua kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: suaɭapən a kaka caʎaʎak a sinvaʎ; sa kaʦu-i a səma kaɭəvəɭəvan azua kaka a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: sualapen a kaka tjaljaljak a sinvalj; sa kacu-i a sema kalevelevan azua kaka a tjavulung.
S.PHON: suaɣapən a kaka ʦaʎaʎak a sinvaʎ; sa kaʦu-i a səma kaɣəvəɣəvan azua kaka a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: The younger brother was taken off her back, and the older sister was taken to heaven.

S.FORM: qau azua kaka a tjaɫaɫak sisekam nua tsemas sa paqerengi.
S.PHON: qau azua kaka a caʎaʎak sisəkam nua ʦəmas sa paqərəŋi.
S.FORM: qau azua kaka a tjaljaljak sisekam nua cemas sa paqerengi.
S.PHON: qau azua kaka a ʦaʎaʎak sisəkam nua ʦəmas sa paqəRəŋi.
S.TRANSL: And the god made a bed for the younger brother and laid him down to sleep.

S.FORM: qau seleman anga avan anga qaung a ladengadengan nua kina.
S.PHON: qau səɭəman aŋa avan aŋa qauŋ a ɭadəŋadəŋan nua kina.
S.FORM: qau seleman anga avan anga qaung a ladengadengan nua kina.
S.PHON: qau səɣəman aŋa avan aŋa qauŋ a ɣadəŋadəŋan nua kina.
S.TRANSL: After dark the mother heard a cry.

S.FORM: qau penaula.
S.PHON: qau pənauɭa.
S.FORM: qau penaula.
S.PHON: qau pənauɣa.
S.TRANSL: She felt sorry.

S.FORM: "ku vaikaw anan a kiqenetj tu kemudakuda," aya a kina.
S.PHON: "ku vaikaw anan a kiqənəc tu kəmudakuda," aja a kina.
S.FORM: "ku vaikaw anan a kiqenetj tu kemudakuda," aya a kina.
S.PHON: "ku vaikaw anan a kiqənəʦ tu kəmudakuda," aja a kina.
S.TRANSL: “I’ll go and see what’s happening,” said the mother,

S.FORM: vaiken sa kiqenetji.
S.PHON: vaikən sa kiqənəci.
S.FORM: vaiken sa kiqenetji.
S.PHON: vaikən sa kiqənəʦi.
S.TRANSL: and went to have a look.

S.FORM: mintu avan anga tjaɫaɫak a aɫak a naqemereng a qemauqaung.
S.PHON: mintu avan aŋa caʎaʎak a aʎak a naqəmərəŋ a qəmauqauŋ.
S.FORM: mintu avan anga tjaljaljak a aljak a naqemereng a qemauqaung.
S.PHON: mintu avan aŋa ʦaʎaʎak a aʎak a naqəməRəŋ a qəmauqauŋ.
S.TRANSL: There was the younger child lying down and crying.

S.FORM: qau mapuvarung azua kina.
S.PHON: qau mapuvaruŋ azua kina.
S.FORM: qau mapuvarung azua kina.
S.PHON: qau mapuvaRuŋ azua kina.
S.TRANSL: The mother was anxious,

S.FORM: karimen azua aɫak a tjavulung.
S.PHON: karimən azua aʎak a cavuɭuŋ.
S.FORM: karimen azua aljak a tjavulung.
S.PHON: kaRimən azua aʎak a ʦavuɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: and searched for the older child.

S.FORM: mareka qauqavan; ɫakua nekangata.
S.PHON: marəka qauqavan; ʎakua nəkaŋata.
S.FORM: mareka qauqavan; ljakua nekangata.
S.PHON: maRəka qauqavan; ʎakua nəkaŋata.
S.TRANSL: She kept shouting, but there was no sign of her.

S.FORM: qau miseleman anga, nekangata.
S.PHON: qau misəɭəman aŋa, nəkaŋata.
S.FORM: qau miseleman anga, nekangata.
S.PHON: qau misəɣəman aŋa, nəkaŋata.
S.TRANSL: It got dark, but there was no sign of the child.

S.FORM: vaik anga a tjumaq azua kina, sa tjumaɫi a kama.
S.PHON: vaik aŋa a cumaq azua kina, sa cumaʎi a kama.
S.FORM: vaik anga a tjumaq azua kina, sa tjumalji a kama.
S.PHON: vaik aŋa a ʦumaq azua kina, sa ʦumaʎi a kama.
S.TRANSL: The mother went home and told the father.

S.FORM: qau mapuvarung a kama katua kina.
S.PHON: qau mapuvaruŋ a kama katua kina.
S.FORM: qau mapuvarung a kama katua kina.
S.PHON: qau mapuvaRuŋ a kama katua kina.
S.TRANSL: Father and mother were both anxious,

S.FORM: tsemangitsangitj anga i tjumaq sakamaya.
S.PHON: ʦəmaŋiʦaŋic aŋa i cumaq sakamaja.
S.FORM: cemangicangitj anga i tjumaq sakamaya.
S.PHON: ʦəmaŋiʦaŋiʦ aŋa i ʦumaq sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: and just wailed at home.

S.FORM: mintu sika pitju a qadaw tu kinaulavan nazua keḍikeḍi, mangtjez azua keḍikeḍi a tjumaq.
S.PHON: mintu sika picu a qadaw tu kinauɭavan nazua kəɖikəɖi, maŋcəz azua kəɖikəɖi a cumaq.
S.FORM: mintu sika pitju a qadaw tu kinaulavan nazua kedrikedri, mangtjez azua kedrikedri a tjumaq.
S.PHON: mintu sika piʦu a qadaw tu kinauɣavan nazua kəɖikəɖi, maŋʦəz azua kəɖikəɖi a ʦumaq.
S.TRANSL: Then on the seventh day from the loss of the child, the child came home.

S.FORM: ɫakua qatsanga aravats, bulay anga uta.
S.PHON: ʎakua qaʦaŋa aravaʦ, buɭaj aŋa uta.
S.FORM: ljakua qacanga aravac, bulay anga uta.
S.PHON: ʎakua qaʦaŋa aRavaʦ, buɣaj aŋa uta.
S.TRANSL: But she was very tall and beautiful too.

S.FORM: qau ini keɫang a marekakama tu nima a aɫak.
S.PHON: qau ini kəʎaŋ a marəkakama tu nima a aʎak.
S.FORM: qau ini keljang a marekakama tu nima a aljak.
S.PHON: qau ini kəʎaŋ a maRəkakama tu nima a aʎak.
S.TRANSL: Her parents didn’t know whose child she was,

S.FORM: qau kivadaqan tu kasinu a tsautsau, tu tima a ngadan nimadju.
S.PHON: qau kivadaqan tu kasinu a ʦauʦau, tu tima a ŋadan nimaɉu.
S.FORM: qau kivadaqan tu kasinu a caucau, tu tima a ngadan nimadju.
S.PHON: qau kivadaqan tu kasinu a ʦauʦau, tu tima a ŋadan nimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: and asked her where she came from and what her name was.

S.FORM: qau tjemumaɫ azua keḍikeḍi tua vinaikan a ɫevavaw.
S.PHON: qau cəmumaʎ azua kəɖikəɖi tua vinaikan a ʎəvavaw.
S.FORM: qau tjemumalj azua kedrikedri tua vinaikan a ljevavaw.
S.PHON: qau ʦəmumaʎ azua kəɖikəɖi tua vinaikan a ʎəvavaw.
S.TRANSL: And the child told them about how she had gone up above.

S.FORM: "tazua qemaung a ku sinvaɫ; qau mayanga ku piqan.
S.PHON: "tazua qəmauŋ a ku sinvaʎ; qau majaŋa ku piqan.
S.FORM: "tazua qemaung a ku sinvalj; qau mayanga ku piqan.
S.PHON: "tazua qəmauŋ a ku sinvaʎ; qau majaŋa ku piqan.
S.TRANSL: “The brother I was carrying was crying, not to mention how tired I was.

S.FORM: qau vaik aken a sema tjua mui a qatsiɫay, sa ku senay.
S.PHON: qau vaik akən a səma cua mui a qaʦiʎaj, sa ku sənaj.
S.FORM: qau vaik aken a sema tjua mui a qaciljay, sa ku senay.
S.PHON: qau vaik akən a səma ʦua mui a qaʦiʎaj, sa ku sənaj.
S.TRANSL: So I went to the quartz rock and sang.

S.FORM: manu mangtjez a tsemas, sa sualapi ti aḍing; sa katsu-i aken a sema vavaw itjua kalevelevan.
S.PHON: manu maŋcəz a ʦəmas, sa suaɭapi ti aɖiŋ; sa kaʦu-i akən a səma vavaw icua kaɭəvəɭəvan.
S.FORM: manu mangtjez a cemas, sa sualapi ti adring; sa kacu-i aken a sema vavaw itjua kalevelevan.
S.PHON: manu maŋʦəz a ʦəmas, sa suaɣapi ti aɖiŋ; sa kaʦu-i akən a səma vavaw iʦua kaɣəvəɣəvan.
S.TRANSL: And a god came and took the boy off me; and I was taken up to heaven.

S.FORM: ɫakua tutsu sinan aɫak anga ken nua tsemas.
S.PHON: ʎakua tuʦu sinan aʎak aŋa kən nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: ljakua tucu sinan aljak anga ken nua cemas.
S.PHON: ʎakua tuʦu sinan aʎak aŋa kən nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: But now I have been adopted by the god.

S.FORM: ini anga muri i tjumaq aken," aya azua keḍikeḍi.
S.PHON: ini aŋa muri i cumaq akən," aja azua kəɖikəɖi.
S.FORM: ini anga muri i tjumaq aken," aya azua kedrikedri.
S.PHON: ini aŋa muRi i ʦumaq akən," aja azua kəɖikəɖi.
S.TRANSL: I won’t be at home any more,” said the child.

S.FORM: qau patjara keɫangan nua kina katua kama tu niamadju a aɫak.
S.PHON: qau pacara kəʎaŋan nua kina katua kama tu niamaɉu a aʎak.
S.FORM: qau patjara keljangan nua kina katua kama tu niamadju a aljak.
S.PHON: qau paʦaRa kəʎaŋan nua kina katua kama tu niamaɉu a aʎak.
S.TRANSL: Then the mother and father realised that it was their child.

S.FORM: vetseqelen a lima a kula; masengats anga semau.
S.PHON: vəʦəqəɭən a ɭima a kuɭa; masəŋaʦ aŋa səmau.
S.FORM: veceqelen a lima a kula; masengac anga semau.
S.PHON: vəʦəqəɣən a ɣima a kuɣa; masəŋaʦ aŋa səmau.
S.TRANSL: They held onto her arms and legs; they didn’t want to let her go.

S.FORM: "mayanga vaik.
S.PHON: "majaŋa vaik.
S.FORM: "mayanga vaik.
S.PHON: "majaŋa vaik.
S.TRANSL: “Don’t go!

S.FORM: imaza-i anga," ayain nua matjaɫaɫak.
S.PHON: imaza-i aŋa," ajain nua macaʎaʎak.
S.FORM: imaza-i anga," ayain nua matjaljaljak.
S.PHON: imaza-i aŋa," ajain nua maʦaʎaʎak.
S.TRANSL: Let’s all stay here!” her parents said to her.

S.FORM: ɫakua ini kisalu azua keḍikeḍi.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini kisaɭu azua kəɖikəɖi.
S.FORM: ljakua ini kisalu azua kedrikedri.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini kisaɣu azua kəɖikəɖi.
S.TRANSL: But the child wouldn’t agree.

S.FORM: avan a "pavayi aken tua vaqu tu tjelu a vatan," aya.
S.PHON: avan a "pavaji akən tua vaqu tu cəɭu a vatan," aja.
S.FORM: avan a "pavayi aken tua vaqu tu tjelu a vatan," aya.
S.PHON: avan a "pavaji akən tua vaqu tu ʦəɣu a vatan," aja.
S.TRANSL: Instead she said: “Give me three millet seeds.”

S.FORM: qau malap a matsidiɫ, sa pakauvuan tua quvaɫ nimadju.
S.PHON: qau maɭap a maʦidiʎ, sa pakauvuan tua quvaʎ nimaɉu.
S.FORM: qau malap a macidilj, sa pakauvuan tua quvalj nimadju.
S.PHON: qau maɣap a maʦidiʎ, sa pakauvuan tua quvaʎ nimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: She took them herself, and put them in among her hair.

S.FORM: tsuay anga pagaɫu, "muri vaik anga ken.
S.PHON: ʦuaj aŋa pagaʎu, "muri vaik aŋa kən.
S.FORM: cuay anga pagalju, "muri vaik anga ken.
S.PHON: ʦuaj aŋa pagaʎu, "muRi vaik aŋa kən.
S.TRANSL: After a while she said: “Now I’m going.

S.FORM: ɫakua ku katsuaw tsu a vaqu.
S.PHON: ʎakua ku kaʦuaw ʦu a vaqu.
S.FORM: ljakua ku kacuaw cu a vaqu.
S.PHON: ʎakua ku kaʦuaw ʦu a vaqu.
S.TRANSL: But I’ll take this millet.

S.FORM: nu tjaɫu kalevelevan aken, ku sitalem anga tsu.
S.PHON: nu caʎu kaɭəvəɭəvan akən, ku sitaɭəm aŋa ʦu.
S.FORM: nu tjalju kalevelevan aken, ku sitalem anga cu.
S.PHON: nu ʦaʎu kaɣəvəɣəvan akən, ku sitaɣəm aŋa ʦu.
S.TRANSL: When I get to heaven, I’ll plant this.

S.FORM: qau nu liaw anga, a maisu anga tu ku kanen a matsidiɫ, nu maisu aken, ki zemuzung.
S.PHON: qau nu ɭiaw aŋa, a maisu aŋa tu ku kanən a maʦidiʎ, nu maisu akən, ki zəmuzuŋ.
S.FORM: qau nu liaw anga, a maisu anga tu ku kanen a macidilj, nu maisu aken, ki zemuzung.
S.PHON: qau nu ɣiaw aŋa, a maisu aŋa tu ku kanən a maʦidiʎ, nu maisu akən, ki zəmuzuŋ.
S.TRANSL: When it has grown and when I pound grain for myself to eat, when I’m pounding it will thunder.

S.FORM: ɫakua, ku marekakama, azua a maisuisu tua ku kanen, aya-u anga."
S.PHON: ʎakua, ku marəkakama, azua a maisuisu tua ku kanən, aja-u aŋa."
S.FORM: ljakua, ku marekakama, azua a maisuisu tua ku kanen, aya-u anga."
S.PHON: ʎakua, ku maRəkakama, azua a maisuisu tua ku kanən, aja-u aŋa."
S.TRANSL: But, my parents, think that it’s me pounding my food.”

S.FORM: qau paetez nua kai.
S.PHON: qau paətəz nua kai.
S.FORM: qau paetez nua kai.
S.PHON: qau paətəz nua kai.
S.TRANSL: That was all she said.

S.FORM: mintu maulaw; ini keɫang tu sema inu.
S.PHON: mintu mauɭaw; ini kəʎaŋ tu səma inu.
S.FORM: mintu maulaw; ini keljang tu sema inu.
S.PHON: mintu mauɣaw; ini kəʎaŋ tu səma inu.
S.TRANSL: She disappeared, and they didn’t know where she had gone.

S.FORM: avan anga kama katua kina sakamaya a qemauqaung i tjumaq.
S.PHON: avan aŋa kama katua kina sakamaja a qəmauqauŋ i cumaq.
S.FORM: avan anga kama katua kina sakamaya a qemauqaung i tjumaq.
S.PHON: avan aŋa kama katua kina sakamaja a qəmauqauŋ i ʦumaq.
S.TRANSL: So the father and mother were just left at home crying.
